globalNews.title: 'I thought I was going to die' - Venezuelans describe earthquake panic
globalNews.summary: Buildings were flattened in the capital Caracas, where voices have been heard calling from the rubble.

globalNews.title: Earthquake is devastating blow to Venezuela at time of uncertainty
globalNews.summary: The twin quakes come less than six months after Venezuela's then-leader Nicolás Maduro was seized by US forces.

globalNews.title: Europe's heatwave shifts east as France raises health alert to highest level
globalNews.summary: Temperatures in Germany could hit 40C in some areas while French officials say deaths linked to the heat are being seen among young people.

globalNews.title: Trump asks Congress for billions for Iran war, after tension with Republicans
globalNews.summary: But the budget faces an uphill battle as the president spars with some members of his own party over the issue.

globalNews.title: Key figure in South Africa police corruption scandal pleads guilty
globalNews.summary: Prosecutors say Vusimusi "Cat" Matlala could provide evidence against "high-ranking officials".

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin drops to $58K on high US PCE inflation as trader sees 'manipulation'
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin fell to 21-month lows as stock market volatility accompanied three-year highs in US PCE inflation, leading to $600 million in hourly crypto liquidations.

cryptoNews.title: Why Wall Street values some crypto firms for AI power, not just crypto
cryptoNews.summary: Galaxy Digital’s stock surge points to a new trend: Investors are rewarding some crypto firms for AI infrastructure, not just digital asset exposure.

cryptoNews.title: Story Protocol rebrands to DATA Foundation in AI pivot
cryptoNews.summary: Story Protocol is now the DATA Foundation as it aims to provide licensable data to AI firms that have “run out of internet to scrape.”

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: SBI to acquire Bitbank in $289M deal creating Japan's biggest crypto exchange
cryptoNews.summary: The Japanese financial conglomerate plans to take full control of Bitbank as it expands an ecosystem spanning crypto trading, stablecoins, tokenization and blockchain infrastructure.

aiNews.title: Netris raises $15M Series A from a16z to help AI neoclouds go live faster
aiNews.summary: Netris provides software that runs on network switches, and offers a platform that helps neocloud operators reduce the time it takes to go live.

aiNews.title: 2 days left to save up to $190: Join 1,000+ founders and investors at TechCrunch Founder Summit
aiNews.summary: 2 days left to lock in your spot at TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 and save up to $190 before Early Bird rates expire on June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register here.

aiNews.title: Adobe acquires image and video enhancement tool maker Topaz Labs
aiNews.summary: Adobe said that it will integrate Topaz Labs' tools across its apps.

aiNews.title: Amazon ups India bet with fresh $13B AI infrastructure investment
aiNews.summary: Amazon’s latest India investment comes as global tech companies race to expand AI infrastructure in the country.

aiNews.title: Europe is pushing back on Washington’s chip war
